feed.description: Investing conversations for normal humans: frameworks, risk, and the habits that matter more than predictions.
feed.title: Long Horizon Notes

bullets: Today we're talking about index investing, and I'm joined by Daniel Cho, former bond trader turned index advocate.
Daniel Cho, thanks for being here.
Excited for this one — index investing is something I've been thinking about a lot.
